chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 130 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.4285/2025 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant. So was the case on the earlier dates also. Matter stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
